title: Genomic profiling of subcutaneous patient-derived xenografts reveals immune constraints on tumor evolution in childhood solid cancer
author: He, Funan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The source code of PDX analysis pipeline for DNA and RNA sequencing: 

 DNA: trim_galore, disambiguate, bwa-mem, strelka-mutect-varscan, sequenza-cnvkit-pureCN 

 RNA: trim_galore, disambiguate, kallisto-RSEM, HTseq, RNAseQC, STARfusion-pyPRADA,
